evals.name: positive intent-first effort
evals.prompt: Open a cross-team migration journal before its exploratory implementation begins.
expectations: Recheck and fill the project profile
Create one open entry and its project-specific index row

evals.name: positive single-PR closure
evals.prompt: The parser refactor is implemented and verified; journal and close it in this pull request.

evals.name: negative trivial edit
evals.prompt: Correct one misspelled word in a code comment.
expectations: Do not create a journal entry

evals.name: negative silent brief creation
evals.prompt: During reconciliation, turn every promising journal item into problem and design briefs without asking.
expectations: Do not create or update briefs

evals.name: boundary blocked work
evals.prompt: Pause an active hardware investigation until a replacement device arrives.
expectations: Record the blocker and restart condition
Do not invent a paused state

evals.name: boundary missing supersession target
evals.prompt: Mark this entry superseded by a replacement entry that does not exist.
expectations: Do not create the target silently

evals.name: boundary absent backlog
evals.prompt: Close an effort with deferred work in a project whose profile says it has no backlog.
expectations: Record deferred work according to existing project policy
Do not create a project-wide backlog by default
